body.text: The vast majority of images on the site have been converted into a more efficient format which should make loading image heavy pages faster for everyone. I've also finished the first pass I've been mentioning in previous updates on the rest of the site. As before, I've also been making some minor changes to different parts of the site while working on this. Below is a non-comprehensive list of the additional changes.

texts: Slightly increased the compression quality of uploaded images after noticing that some were having tears/artifacts due to compression.
Fixed Artwork and Voiceline Guesser setup menu saying 'Begin Draft!' instead of 'Begin!'.
Fixed Artwork Guesser setup menu preventing unchecking of the include Uptie/Preuptie art options.
Fixed Voiceline Guesser setup menu displaying 'Artwork Guesser'.
Fixed comment button on MD Plans directing to an invalid page.
Made minor adjustments to the layout of MD Pages, primarily for mobile.
Made adjustments and added some text to the Emotes and Stickers pickers.
Adjusted or expanded on descriptions of pages and a number of labels across the site.
Applied a slight grayscale filter to marked gifts and theme packs when using tracking mode in MD Plans.
